hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '\.(vue|js|ts|jsx|tsx|py|go|java|rs)$' && cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}" && command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && python3 -c "from graphify.watch import _rebuild_code; from pathlib import Path; _rebuild_code(Path('.'))" 2>/dev/null || true
